message:
🐛 Fix Netlify SPA routing breaking asset loading (#445)

Add `force = false` to the SPA redirect rule so it only applies to
routes that don't have a matching file. Without this, the wildcard
redirect was serving index.html for /assets/* requests, breaking
the entire site.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -18,11 +18,12 @@
   to = "/.netlify/functions/presence"
   status = 200
 
-# SPA routing - redirect all routes to index.html
+# SPA routing - redirect all routes to index.html (only if file doesn't exist)
 [[redirects]]
   from = "/*"
   to = "/index.html"
   status = 200
+  force = false
 
 # Headers for security and caching
 [[headers]]
